calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

Re Ntc Of Continuance Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ross McLauran Madden, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Michael Vollmer, Christopher A. H. Vollmer, Jill L. Vollmer, John Vollmer and Diana Vollmer 1997 Revocable Inter-Vibos Trust dated April 1, 1997.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Katherine B. Davis.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Diana Vollmer worn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Plaintiff Michael Vollmer, Christopher A.H. Vollmer, Jill L. Vollmer, John Vollmer and Diana Vollmer 1997 Revocable Inter-Vivos Trust dated April 1, 1997, have and recover Judgment from Defendant Katherine B. Davis, the sum of $89,583.92 plus reasonable Attorney Fees and Costs to be claimed in a Cost Memorandum.
Court signed Judgment in open court.
Counsel for Plaintiff to file a Memoramdum of Costs and declaration for reasonable Attorney's fees and submit a filed endorsed copy with Proposed Amended Judgment.

Motion To Set Date For Prove-Up Hearing For Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
